name: ALCopsDetectTfmFromNuGetDevTools
friendlyName: ALCops Detect TFM from NuGet DevTools
description: Detect the target framework moniker from the Microsoft.Dynamics.BusinessCentral.Development.Tools NuGet package version
author: ALCops
instanceNameFormat: ALCops Detect TFM from NuGet DevTools

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: DevTools Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Version of `Microsoft.Dynamics.BusinessCentral.Development.Tools`: `latest`, `prerelease`, or a specific version (e.g., `26.0.12345.0`)

outputVariables.name: tfm
outputVariables.description: The detected target framework moniker (e.g., net8.0, netstandard2.1)
